column1: # heat pump system comprehensive data file
# purpose: contains all configuration parameters and operation data of heat pump systems in the residential area
# update frequency: parameter part is updated when system configuration changes
# - room_id: room unique identifier (building number-unit number-room number-room type)
# - physical parameters: physical characteristics of the room (area
# - temperature parameters: temperature set value and limit
# - device parameters: heat pump performance parameters
# - time parameters: typical operation period and scheduling information
# 1. room_id format: building number-unit number-room number-room type
#    - residential type: most of the time at home
#    - working type: go to work during the day
#    - student type: go out during school time
#    - duplex large open space: duplex structure large space
#    - standard room with bathroom: standard room with bathroom
#    - suite with bathroom: suite with bathroom and additional functional area
#    - main usage period: high temperature requirements
#    - secondary usage period: can lower temperature
#    - infant room temperature fluctuation is small
#    - elderly room temperature should be slightly higher
#    - living room temperature range is large
